instant.evidence: Near-real-time: scheduler polls recent BC comments on a short window (MENTION_WINDOW_MINUTES) with per-bucket cursors so new mentions are answered promptly and catch-up survives downtime.

natural.evidence: Responds with a natural-language plan (anticipated goal, summary, proposed steps, confidence) as a BC comment.

permitted.evidence: Acts only via each user's own BC OAuth token (per-user identity/visibility); bot-author guard (BOT_AUTHOR_IDS) and automated-card loop guard prevent answering other agents; never re-answers closed tickets.

adaptive.evidence: Feeds the human's comment (user_feedback) plus crawled context into plan_inference for each response; per-bucket cursors adapt the scan window over time.

contextual.evidence: context_collector crawls the parent ticket to ground the plan (retrieval), rather than answering from the model alone.

transparent.evidence: Writes a heartbeat (output/ops/_cb_mentions/heartbeat.json) exposed at /admin/cb-mentions.json; every response carries an explicit confidence %; per-user results and cutoff_sources logged.

governance.evidence: Per-tick circuit breaker (MAX_RESPONSES_PER_TICK=12) bounds blast radius; OPS_CB_MENTION_POLLING_ENABLED=false halts; the posted comment proposes work that a human approves to execute.

observability.evidence: Heartbeat + admin endpoint + structured per-user logging answer 'is CB alive, did it fail silently?'.

availability.evidence: Per-bucket cursors + MAX_LOOKBACK cap + bucket rotation + best-effort disk writes keep the cron resilient; a single bucket/user failure is isolated.

lexicon.evidence: Standardized 'CB System: automated response' header and rubric-conformant response shape; loop guard keys on that lexicon. Enforced fleet-wide by the canonical glossary (config/lexicon.json) via the deterministic checker execution/ops_platform/lexicon.py and the scripts/lexicon_check.py CI gate; this artifact passes with zero forbidden-term or drift violations.

solid.evidence: Idempotent via seen.json; sentinel fallback comment on failure; circuit breaker; bot/automated-card guards; errors isolated per mention.

layers.name: Real-Time Data Fabric
layers.how: Short-window polling with per-bucket cursors for near-real-time mention response.

layers.name: Intelligent Retrieval (RAG)
layers.how: context_collector crawls the parent ticket to ground each plan.

layers.name: Agent-Aware Governance
layers.how: Per-user OAuth scope, loop/bot guards, per-tick circuit breaker, polling kill-switch.

notes: Prod-facing autonomous AI (live since 2026-06-14). agent_registry posture declared in config/tbi_runtime_agents.json (autonomous_low_risk_only; auto-action = post a non-binding recommendation; proposed work is human-approved).
